name: Ming
description:
Ming was once a battle-hardened soldier, and years of fighting have given her the experience to hold her own in combat. She's equipped with an electromagnetic arm capable of manipulating electric currents to perform a variety of attacks.

As dazzling as lightning and as loud as thunder, the unstoppable rebellious girl swipes the battlefield. Ming vows to shatter all obstacles in her way, raising the flag of The Scissors to create a just world free from oppression.
creator: uteenlearn
